question: What is CloudCounselage?
answer: CloudCounselage is an IT and management consulting company with a social mission to help students and freshers become job-ready through free internship programs and training.

question: What is the Global Professional Internship GPI?
answer: The Global Professional Internship (GPI) is a structured, experience-based program where interns work on live projects under mentor guidance to build real-world skills.

question: Is the internship paid or free?
answer: The internship is 100% free and unpaid. There are no fees to join. Interns receive an Experience Certificate and mentor support.

question: How long is the internship duration?
answer: The internship runs for 6 weeks to 6 months, requiring around 120 hours of self-paced work. It is flexible and can be balanced with your college schedule.

question: How do I apply or join the internship?
answer: Register on the IAC portal, complete the preparation modules, then fill out the Live Project Onboarding / New Joinee Form. Your Appointment Letter will be sent by email after verification.

question: When will I get my appointment letter?
answer: Your Appointment Letter is issued within 5 to 7 business days after you submit the onboarding form and your documents are verified by the HR team.

question: Is the internship remote or work from home?
answer: Yes, all GPI internships are completely remote and work-from-home. You can work from anywhere as long as you meet the weekly milestones.

question: What domains are available for internship?
answer: CloudCounselage offers internships in 50+ domains including Python, Data Science, Web Development, AI/ML, Digital Marketing, HR, and Business Operations.

question: Will I get a certificate after internship?
answer: Yes. Interns who complete all tasks, submit deliverables, and pass evaluation receive an official Experience Certificate from CloudCounselage Pvt. Ltd.

question: Can I get a Letter of Recommendation LOR?
answer: Yes. Letters of Recommendation are awarded to top-performing interns who complete tasks early, add extra features, and actively help peers in the community groups.

question: What do I need to submit to complete the internship?
answer: You need to submit: 1) Your completed project code or files, 2) A project report covering tools and methodology, and 3) A short demo video of your project.

question: What happens if I miss the submission deadline?
answer: Request an extension in writing to your project manager before the deadline. Unauthorized late submissions may delay your certificate.

question: How do I contact support or help?
answer: For general queries email welcome@cloudcounselage.com. For HR or certificate issues email hr@cloudcounselage.com. For technical help, post in your domain Telegram or WhatsApp group.

question: How can my certificate be verified?
answer: Future employers can verify your certificate by emailing hr@cloudcounselage.com with your certificate ID.

question: Where is the CloudCounselage office located?
answer: CloudCounselage has offices in Mumbai. BKC office: 91 Springboard, Kagalwala House, BKC Kalina, Mumbai 400098. Vikhroli: 91 Springboard, Godrej & Boyce Estate, Vikhroli West, Mumbai 400079.

question: How do I communicate with my mentor?
answer: Communication is through official domain-specific WhatsApp and Telegram groups. Use these to ask questions, share updates, and get feedback from your mentor.

question: Do I need to attend weekly meetings?
answer: Yes. Interns must attend weekly virtual check-in meetings to review progress, address blockers, and confirm milestones are on track.

question: Is CloudCounselage genuine or a fraud?
answer: CloudCounselage is a legitimate company. All programs are completely free — we never ask for bank details or any payment. Always check that emails come from @cloudcounselage.com.

question: What is the IAC Industry Academia Community?
answer: The IAC is a free community platform run by CloudCounselage connecting students, colleges, and industry professionals for mentorship, training, and job opportunities.

question: How is the project evaluated?
answer: Your project is evaluated based on functionality, code quality, documentation, and your demo video by industry mentors and academic advisors.
